## Summary

<!-- What changed and why (1–3 sentences). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Fix (`fix`)
- [ ] Hotfix (`hotfix`)
- [ ] Release prep (`release`)
- [ ] Docs / chore / CI (`docs` / `chore` / `ci`)

## Branch target

- [ ] → `develop` (default for features)
- [ ] → `main` (release / hotfix only)
- [ ] → `release/*`

## Checklist

- [ ] `flutter analyze --fatal-infos` passes locally
- [ ] `flutter test` passes locally
- [ ] `flutter build web --release` passes (if UI / web-related)
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Touches only the folders owned by this task (see `docs/AI_AGENTS.md`)
- [ ] Architecture freeze rules respected (`docs/ARCHITECTURE_FREEZE.md`)
- [ ] Conventional commit messages used
